MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO AMEND OPERATIVE COMPLAINT TO SUBSTITUTE SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST FOR DECEASED PLAINTIFF (TRANSACTION ID # 74720201) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VELEZ, JAMI

LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF JAMI VELEZ'S MOTION TO AMEND OPERATIVE COMPLAINT TO SUBSTITUTE SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST FOR DECEASED PLAINTIFF. THIS MATTER IS "CONTESTED". COUNSEL APPEARS TO REQUEST THAT THE NAMES OF THE SUCCESSORS-IN-INTEREST BE ADDED TO THE LANGUAGE IN THE PROPOSED ORDER. THERE BEING NO OBJECTION BY THE OTHER SIDE, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING WITH THE MODIFICATION: PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO AMEND OPERATIVE COMPLAINT TO SUBSTITUTE SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST FOR DECEASED PLAINTIFF IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. (SEE THE SIGNED ORDER FOR THE DETAILS OF THE MODIFICATION AND RULING) JUDGE: ROCHELLE C. EAST. CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA. MATTER NOT REPORTED. COURT REPORTER: BAILIFF: NOT PRESENT. (301/RCE)

Notice Of Motion To Amend Operative Complaint To Substitute Successor-In-Interest For Deceased Plaintiff
Off Calendar Nov-01-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Paul Alaga, Esq. of Bryant Law Group LLP, Tel. 415.581.0885, appearing for Plaintiff Jami Velez;
Menna Nachiappan, Esq. of Armijo, Morovati, & Shields, Tel. 213.612.5335, appearing for Defendant Critchfield Mechanical Inc.

Hearing re: PLAINTIFF JAMI VELEZ'S Motion To Amend Operative Complaint To Substitute Successor-In-Interest For Deceased Plaintiff.

This matter is "contested". Mr. Alaga states that he is only appearing to request that the Court add the names of the successors-in-interest to the language in the proposed order. Ms. Nachiappan states that she did receive a copy of the proposed order and that she has no objection.

At the conclusion of counsels' comments, the Court adopts its tentative ruling with the requested modification adding Samantha Velez as successor-in-interest to Jami Velez and Robert Velez as successor-in-interest to Jami Velez as follows:

Plaintiff's unopposed Motion to Amend Operative Complaint to Substitute Successor-in-Interest for Deceased Plaintiff is granted.

Order signed. (see the signed order for details)

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Matter Not Reported. Court Reporter: Bailiff: Not Present. (301/RCE)
